proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv == 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with stage_iv == 0.
Higher ecog_ps (>=2) is associated with shorter mean pfs_months relative to ECOG 0-1.
Higher age_years is associated with shorter mean pfs_months (older = worse PFS, conventional expectation).

analyses.result_summary: Stage IV mean pfs_months=3.703 (n=27481) vs non-stage IV 5.055 (n=22519); Welch t-test p~0.
ECOG>=2 mean pfs_months=2.908 (n=7437) vs ECOG<2 4.557 (n=42563); Welch t-test p~0.
OLS pfs_months ~ age_years: coef=0.1765 per year (95% CI 0.1752, 0.1778), p~0. Direction is OPPOSITE of expectation: older patients have LONGER PFS in this dataset.

proposed_hypotheses.text: kras_mutation == 1 is associated with shorter mean pfs_months than kras_mutation == 0.
nras_mutation == 1 is associated with shorter mean pfs_months than nras_mutation == 0.
braf_v600e == 1 is associated with shorter mean pfs_months than braf_v600e == 0.

analyses.result_summary: KRAS-mut mean PFS=4.121 vs KRAS-WT=4.448; effect=-0.327, p=1.86e-58.
NRAS-mut mean PFS=4.526 vs NRAS-WT=4.305; effect=0.221, p=7.31e-04. Direction OPPOSITE of expected: NRAS-mut has slightly LONGER PFS.
BRAF V600E mut mean PFS=4.094 vs BRAF-WT=4.322; effect=-0.228, p=3.47e-07.

proposed_hypotheses.text: msi_high == 1 is associated with longer mean pfs_months (favorable prognosis) than msi_high == 0.
her2_amplified == 1 is associated with shorter mean pfs_months than her2_amplified == 0.
right_sided_primary == 1 is associated with shorter mean pfs_months than left-sided primaries.

analyses.result_summary: MSI-H mean PFS=4.293 vs MSS 4.313; effect=-0.019, p=0.680. NULL — no MSI-H prognostic effect.
HER2-amp mean PFS=4.258 vs non-amp 4.313; effect=-0.056, p=0.360. NULL.
Right-sided mean PFS=4.114 vs left 4.419; effect=-0.305, p=1.04e-49.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_cetuximab == 1 is associated with longer mean pfs_months unconditionally.
treatment_bevacizumab == 1 is associated with longer mean pfs_months unconditionally.
treatment_pembrolizumab == 1 is associated with longer mean pfs_months unconditionally.
treatment_encorafenib == 1 is associated with longer mean pfs_months unconditionally.
treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib == 1 is associated with longer mean pfs_months unconditionally.
treatment_regorafenib == 1 is associated with longer mean pfs_months unconditionally.

analyses.result_summary: Cetuximab mean PFS=4.285 vs no-cetux 4.323; effect=-0.038, p=0.088. NULL.
Bevacizumab mean PFS=4.301 vs no-bev 4.320; effect=-0.019, p=0.354. NULL.
Pembrolizumab mean PFS=4.316 vs no-pembro 4.311; effect=0.005, p=0.856. NULL.
Encorafenib mean PFS=4.316 vs no 4.311; effect=0.005, p=0.873. NULL.
Trastuzumab/tucatinib mean PFS=4.271 vs no 4.315; effect=-0.044, p=0.244. NULL.
Regorafenib mean PFS=5.089 vs no-rego 4.117; effect=+0.972 months, p=1.71e-216. STRONG positive main effect — only treatment showing one.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_cetuximab × kras_mutation interaction on pfs_months — i.e., cetuximab effect is more favorable in KRAS-WT than KRAS-mut (standard CRC biology: cetuximab works only in KRAS-WT).
In KRAS-WT patients, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer mean pfs_months than no cetuximab.
In KRAS-mut patients, treatment_cetuximab is associated with shorter or unchanged mean pfs_months relative to no cetuximab.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_cetuximab * kras_mutation: interaction coef=0.0196, p=0.665. NULL — no cetuximab × KRAS interaction in this dataset (contrary to standard biology).
In KRAS-WT: cetux mean=4.415 vs no-cetux 4.463; effect=-0.048, p=0.122. NULL — cetuximab does not improve PFS in KRAS-WT.
In KRAS-mut: cetux mean=4.102 vs no-cetux 4.130; effect=-0.028, p=0.376. NULL.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_cetuximab × nras_mutation interaction on pfs_months — i.e., cetuximab effect is more favorable in NRAS-WT than NRAS-mut.
In NRAS-WT patients, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer mean pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction cetux × NRAS: coef=-0.0067, p=0.960. NULL.
In NRAS-WT: effect of cetux on PFS=-0.037, p=0.098. NULL.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a treatment_cetuximab × braf_v600e interaction on pfs_months (cetuximab less effective in BRAF V600E mutant disease).

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction cetux × BRAF V600E: coef=-0.0263, p=0.805. NULL — no interaction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a treatment_cetuximab × right_sided_primary interaction on pfs_months — cetuximab is less effective for right-sided tumors than left-sided (established CRC biology).

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction cetux × right-sided: coef=0.0256, p=0.583. NULL.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_pembrolizumab × msi_high interaction on pfs_months — pembrolizumab provides large PFS benefit selectively in MSI-H disease (KEYNOTE-177).
In MSI-H patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer mean pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.
In MSS patients, treatment_pembrolizumab has no PFS benefit relative to no pembrolizumab.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction pembro × MSI-H: coef=0.0020, p=0.988. NULL — no pembro × MSI interaction (contrary to canonical biology).
In MSI-H: pembro effect on PFS=0.007, p=0.957. NULL.
In MSS: pembro effect on PFS=0.005, p=0.861. NULL — supports h9.3 only trivially (no signal anywhere).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_encorafenib × braf_v600e interaction on pfs_months — encorafenib provides PFS benefit selectively in BRAF V600E mutant disease (BEACON CRC).
In BRAF V600E mutant patients, treatment_encorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months than no encorafenib.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction encorafenib × BRAF V600E: coef=-0.1413, p=0.376. NULL — no encorafenib × BRAF interaction.
In BRAF-mut: encorafenib effect on PFS=-0.129, p=0.329. NULL.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib × her2_amplified interaction on pfs_months — tras/tuca provides PFS benefit selectively in HER2-amplified disease (MOUNTAINEER).
In HER2-amplified patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction tras/tuca × HER2: coef=0.0625, p=0.778. NULL.
In HER2+: tras/tuca effect on PFS=0.017, p=0.934. NULL.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher nlr is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS coef CEA = -0.00535 per ng/mL, p=3.13e-17. Direction matches expectation.
OLS coef albumin = 0.4654 months per g/dL, p=3.25e-115. Strong positive prognostic.
OLS coef LDH = -0.000317, p=0.0126. Modest negative.
OLS coef CRP = -0.00202, p=0.065. NULL.
OLS coef NLR = 0.00522, p=0.290. NULL univariate.
OLS coef weight_loss_pct_6mo = -0.07302, p=2.21e-167. Strong negative prognostic.
OLS coef hemoglobin = -0.01009, p=0.078. NULL univariate; trend negative (opposite of expected).

proposed_hypotheses.text: liver_mets == 1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
bone_mets == 1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
pleural_effusion == 1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Liver mets effect=-0.019, p=0.519. NULL univariate.
Bone mets effect=0.031, p=0.225. NULL.
Pleural effusion effect=-0.052, p=0.069. Trend toward shorter PFS, NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Comorbidities (diabetes_mellitus, hypertension, copd, chronic_kidney_disease, heart_failure, coronary_artery_disease) are individually associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: None of the tested comorbidities was significant. Diabetes p=0.61, HTN p=0.46, COPD p=0.81, CKD p=0.31, HF p=0.98, CAD p=0.92.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS coef fatigue_grade=-0.00173, p=0.853. NULL.
OLS coef pain_nrs=-0.00230, p=0.547. NULL.
OLS coef dyspnea=-0.00924, p=0.312. NULL.

proposed_hypotheses.text: sex_female == 1 is associated with different mean pfs_months than sex_female == 0.
rural_residence == 1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than urban (rural_residence == 0).
Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories.
Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories.

analyses.result_summary: Female vs male effect=-0.0060, p=0.770. NULL.
Rural vs urban effect=0.0245, p=0.339. NULL.
ANOVA F-test across race_ethnicity p=0.479. NULL.
ANOVA F-test across insurance_type p=0.219. NULL.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with prior_chemotherapy == 1 have shorter pfs_months than those without prior chemotherapy.
Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher years_since_diagnosis is associated with longer pfs_months (survivor bias).

analyses.result_summary: Prior chemo effect=-0.0047, p=0.820. NULL.
OLS coef prior_lines=0.00784, p=0.388. NULL.
OLS coef years_since_diagnosis=0.00889, p=0.142. NULL.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a treatment_bevacizumab × kras_mutation interaction on pfs_months.
There is a treatment_bevacizumab × right_sided_primary interaction on pfs_months — bevacizumab provides selective benefit in right-sided tumors (clinical observation).
There is a treatment_bevacizumab × stage_iv interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Bev × KRAS coef=-0.0044, p=0.915. NULL.
Bev × right-sided coef=-0.0221, p=0.608. NULL.
Bev × stage_iv coef=-0.0036, p=0.929. NULL.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In stage_iv == 1 + msi_high == 1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
In stage_iv == 0 + msi_high == 1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: In MSI-H + stage IV: pembro effect=-0.072, n_tx=222, p=0.662. NULL.
In MSI-H + non-stage IV: pembro effect=0.114, n_tx=174, p=0.554. NULL.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age_years, sex_female, ecog_ps, stage_iv, right_sided_primary, kras_mutation, nras_mutation, braf_v600e, msi_high, her2_amplified, cea_ng_ml, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, nlr, crp_mg_l, liver_mets, treatment_regorafenib has a positive adjusted association with pfs_months.

In the same multivariable model, treatment_cetuximab, treatment_bevacizumab, treatment_pembrolizumab, treatment_encorafenib, and treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib all show null adjusted associations with pfs_months.
In the same multivariable model, age_years has a positive adjusted association with pfs_months (the unconditional positive age effect persists after adjustment).

analyses.result_summary: Multivariable OLS R²=0.842. Adjusted treatment_regorafenib coef=0.939 months, p=0.00e+00. CONFIRMED — regorafenib has the only robust adjusted treatment effect.
Adjusted coefs (p): cetux=-0.011 (p=0.23); bev=0.006 (p=0.48); pembro=0.001 (p=0.93); enco=0.009 (p=0.49); tras/tuca=0.023 (p=0.12). All null.
Adjusted age_years coef=0.1757, p=0.00e+00. Positive age effect persists after adjustment (each year older = ~0.18 mo longer PFS).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, cea_ng_ml, the treatment_cetuximab × kras_mutation interaction term remains non-zero.
In the same adjusted model, the treatment_pembrolizumab × msi_high interaction remains non-zero.
In the same adjusted model, the treatment_encorafenib × braf_v600e interaction remains non-zero.
In the same adjusted model, the treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib × her2_amplified interaction remains non-zero.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted cetux × KRAS coef=0.0248, p=0.208. NULL.
Adjusted pembro × MSI coef=0.0483, p=0.388. NULL.
Adjusted enco × BRAF coef=-0.0160, p=0.817. NULL.
Adjusted tras/tuca × HER2 coef=-0.0090, p=0.925. NULL.

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one of the 27 snp_* features is associated with pfs_months at unadjusted p<0.05.
snp_rs1050828 is associated with longer pfs_months (positive coefficient).

analyses.result_summary: Univariate OLS scan of 27 SNP columns vs pfs_months: 3 hits at p<0.05 (snp_rs1801131, snp_rs1050828, snp_rs1801197). Roughly consistent with chance (expected ~1.4 of 27); only modest enrichment.
snp_rs1050828: coef=0.0917, p=0.015. Positive direction matches hypothesis but unadjusted; not robust to multiple-testing correction (Bonferroni threshold 0.05/27 ≈ 0.0019).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In age_years >= 70, the treatment_cetuximab × kras_mutation interaction on pfs_months is non-zero.
In age_years < 70, the treatment_cetuximab × kras_mutation interaction on pfs_months is non-zero.
In age_years >= 70, the treatment_pembrolizumab × msi_high interaction on pfs_months is non-zero.

analyses.result_summary: Older subgroup cetux × KRAS coef=0.0188, p=0.763. NULL.
Younger subgroup cetux × KRAS coef=-0.0261, p=0.558. NULL.
Older subgroup pembro × MSI coef=0.0745, p=0.667. NULL.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In left-sided + RAS/BRAF triple-WT patients, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than no cetuximab (canonical anti-EGFR responder phenotype).
In right-sided + RAS/BRAF triple-WT patients, treatment_cetuximab is not associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: In left + RAS/BRAF-WT (n=16443): cetux effect=-0.067, p=0.125. Direction OPPOSITE of expected (slightly worse with cetux), and NS.
In right + RAS/BRAF-WT: cetux effect=-0.026, p=0.586. NULL.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a NEGATIVE treatment_regorafenib × kras_mutation interaction on pfs_months — i.e., regorafenib provides PFS benefit in KRAS-WT but not in KRAS-mut.
There is a NEGATIVE treatment_regorafenib × braf_v600e interaction on pfs_months — i.e., regorafenib provides PFS benefit in BRAF-WT but not in BRAF V600E mutant.
There is a treatment_regorafenib × msi_high interaction on pfs_months.
In KRAS-WT, treatment_regorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months (large effect).
In KRAS-mut, treatment_regorafenib is not associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction regorafenib × KRAS: coef=-1.629, p=7.69e-226. STRONGLY significant negative interaction — regorafenib benefit is concentrated in KRAS-WT.
OLS interaction regorafenib × BRAF V600E: coef=-1.183, p=6.13e-23. Significant negative interaction — regorafenib benefit largely confined to BRAF-WT.
OLS interaction regorafenib × MSI-H: coef=-0.0219, p=0.850. NULL.
In KRAS-WT (stratified): regorafenib mean PFS=5.773 vs no-regorafenib 4.117; effect=+1.656 mo, p=6.07e-293. Strong selective benefit.
In KRAS-mut (stratified): regorafenib mean PFS=4.143 vs no-regorafenib 4.116; effect=+0.027 mo, p=0.456. NULL — no benefit when KRAS mutated.
